description_long: This object is a historical black powder cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four spoked wheels. The cannon itself is made of dark metal, featuring several reinforcing bands and bolts along its cylindrical barrel. The wooden carriage is reinforced with metal brackets and bolts, and it supports the heavy barrel securely. In front of the carriage, there are several black spherical cannonballs, indicating its ammunition. The wheels are robust and designed to allow the cannon to be repositioned, while the overall construction suggests durability and strength. The object has a weathered, utilitarian appearance, typical of artillery pieces used in historical urban or military settings.
description: A large, dark metal cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage, accompanied by several black cannonballs. The design is robust and historical, with visible metal reinforcements and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and a cluster of cannonballs in front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle of the cannon, the alignment of the wheels, and cannonballs to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the carriage structure and cannonballs in front.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the breech of the cannon, the carriage's rear structure, and cannonballs to the right.
